title: Trichomanes ovale
taxonomy: Trichomanes ovale is classified within the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. This plant belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy fern family. The genus Trichomanes is a group of ferns that are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. Trichomanes ovale is a species of filmy fern that is native to tropical Asia. It is often found growing in shaded, humid areas with high humidity and moderate temperatures.
uses: Trichomanes ovale is a species of fern known to have various medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
